sql_array: CREATE TABLE snowflake_ids (event_time DateTime, snowflake_id UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE snowflake_ids SET snowflake_id = dateTimeToSnowflakeID(toDateTime('2023-01-01 12:00:00', 'UTC')) WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2022-01-01 00:00:00', 'UTC');
SELECT event_time, snowflake_id FROM snowflake_ids WHERE snowflake_id > dateTimeToSnowflakeID(toDateTime('2021-12-31 23:59:59', 'UTC'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM snowflake_ids WHERE snowflake_id = dateTimeToSnowflakeID(toDateTime('2022-02-01 15:30:00', 'UTC'));
